action.reasoning: Observation: current best and latest evaluated policy achieves success_rate 0.09, with 18/20 sit_simple successes and no reproducible gains found from the pole grid. Remaining time is about 7.5 minutes, which is less than the observed evaluation time (~15-16 minutes) and far too short for another meaningful real-env search plus final eval. Analysis: any further modification would risk losing the verified best solution without enough time to validate it. Decision: stop and keep the already-submitted best checkpoint/predict.py as final.
action.done_reason: Best verified success_rate is 0.09 and remaining time is insufficient for another safe train/search/eval cycle.

done_reason: Best verified success_rate is 0.09 and remaining time is insufficient for another safe train/search/eval cycle.
